description: Letter addressed to a dignitary a named [...] b. Khalaf b. Saʿadya. In Hebrew. Formal letter with wide space between the lines. Only the Hebrew introduction is preserved, and a few words clarifying the intention of something (לא היתה מגמתו . . .).
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
